summary.title: SUMMARY
description: Result-oriented Frontend Developer (Vue.js) with 3+ years of commercial experience building scalable, high-performance web applications. Specialized in the Vue 2/3 ecosystem (Composition API, Pinia, Vuetify) with a strong focus on clean architecture, SEO optimization, and performance improvements based on Lighthouse metrics. Leveraging a background in management to deeply understand business processes, I independently design and implement pixel-perfect responsive features, improve existing codebases, and deliver solutions tailored for long-term product scalability.

description.title: Dent-LIfe Dental Clinic
achievements: Developed SEO-optimized website using Vue 3 + Vite SSG
Implemented multi-language support (UA / EN / RU)
Built 6 service pages with structured SEO content
Integrated schema.org (JSON-LD), Google Maps API, Google Reviews
Optimized performance and initial load speed (SSG, request throttling)
Fully responsive UI with reusable components

description.title: Rock Paper Scissors (Marketing Agency startup)»
achievements: Built SPA using Vue 3 (Composition API) + Vite, no router
Implemented lead generation forms with validation and email submission (Formspree)
Added multi-layer bot protection (honeypot, timing check, reCAPTCHA)
Managed global state with Pinia
Created reusable UI components and SVG-based responsive design
Developed and maintained Vue 2/3 components using Composition and Options API
Built reusable component structures that improved development speed for new features
Implemented responsive, pixel-perfect UI based on Figma designs
Customized Vuetify components to match project design system
Integrated Swiper Element for interactive UI features
Performed cross-browser testing (BrowserStack) and fixed UI/UX issues
Improved code maintainability by refactoring existing components
Developed and maintained e-commerce website (WooCommerce + Elementor)
Built a custom Vue application to automate bulk uploading of variable products
Improved product page structure and SEO, increasing visibility in search engines
Optimized UI/UX of product pages to improve user engagement
Managed hosting, domain, and Google Business profile
Created marketing materials, product visuals, and branding assets

description.company: NCH Advisors Inc. (Representative Office in Ukraine)
achievements: IT infrastructure support, networking, system administration
Experience working with financial data and international operations
